Honoring Lives with Dignity

Welcome to
Mamoratwa Wa Afrika.

Rooted in our love for African people and our commitment to community — we are here to bring you comfort and solace when you need it most.

Our Packages Get in Touch
[ Image – family / comfort scene ]
Who We Are

Bringing you Comfort.

Our business is centered around people. We have been working with and helping communities for years. This time, we combined our ideas to create a funeral undertaking service rooted in our love for African people and our commitment to our community.

What sets us apart is our dedication to bringing you comfort and solace when you need it the most. Every life deserves to be honoured with the dignity it was lived with.

About Us
Our Offerings

Funeral Cover Plans

Choose the plan that best fits your family's needs. All plans include professional and compassionate service.

Comfort
R170 / month
✓
R15,000 funeral cover
✓
Professional embalming
✓
Standard coffin (choice of 3)
✓
Hearse transport (within 50km)
✓
One night viewing
✓
Administrative assistance
✓
6-month waiting period
Choose Comfort

✓
Catering for 100 guests

✓

✓

Community Voices

What Families Say About Us

"

My favourite funeral home ever. They treated our family with such grace and professionalism during the most difficult time of our lives.

Boitumelo C.
"

The Best Undertaker in the World. Their service goes beyond what is expected — they truly care about each family they serve.

Nomsa K.
"

It shocked us at a small village in Botswana. They honoured our beloved sister on her last day on earth. Mmamoratwa is the best.

Tudu M.
"

Their service was super — the cars, the drivers were very neat. They gave my Aunt a special send-off. Mamoratwa Wa Afrika rocks!

Mamosa P.

Request a Quote

Planning for a funeral can be overwhelming, but we're here to make the process as smooth and stress-free as possible.

Find Us

Our Branches

Zeerust Branch
43 Klip St, Zeerust, 2865
Mon–Fri: 08:00–17:00  |  Sat: 08:00–13:00
Sundays / Public Holidays: Closed
Mafikeng Branch
Office No. 7, Warren Street, Mafikeng
Mon–Fri: 08:00–17:00  |  Sat: 08:00–13:00
Sundays / Public Holidays: Closed
📞 083 584 4679 🚨 073 621 3508 (Emergency) ✉ admin@mwau.co.za
